leadText: Toxic Boost (Japanese: どくぼうそう Poison Rampage) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Zangoose.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokémon with this Ability is poisoned or badly poisoned , the power of its physical moves is increased by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Toxic Boost has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokémon with this Ability is poisoned or badly poisoned , the power of its physical moves is increased by 50%.
